content: MapLibre GL JS (WebGL, vector tiles) vs Leaflet (DOM/Canvas, raster tiles, plugin-rich, simplest API). For a single click/drag pin picker with no heavy data-layer needs, Leaflet is simpler and has the lowest learning curve; MapLibre is overkill unless 3D/vector styling or thousands of markers are needed. Leaflet + a free raster tile provider (OpenStreetMap tiles, CARTO free tiles) is the standard lightweight choice for this use case.
